items.informed_by_trend: Royal Pop Straps and Adapters Launching Soon

copy.body_3_25s: Competitor straps look great but lack crucial features like quick release and custom fit options. With Royal Pop Wrist Kit, you get a seamless clip-in adapter, premium silicone or leather strap, plus a microfiber pouch and spare pins. Upgrade your watch experience without compromise.
copy.cta_25_30s: Tell me what you'd pay for a wrist kit like this
b_roll: close-up of Royal Pop clip-in adapter in action
copy.caption:
Royal Pop accessories: What's missing? Competitor straps look great but lack crucial features. Upgrade your watch experience with our seamless kit. #royalpop #apswatch #watchaccessories #wristkit #watchupgrade

Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.

items.preview: Day 1 of building the wrist kit

copy.hook_0_3s: Day 1 of building the wrist kit
copy.body_3_25s: We're diving into the details today, bringing our premium Royal Pop Wrist Conversion Kit to life with precision and care. From selecting high-quality materials to crafting a perfect fit, every step matters in creating something truly special for you.
copy.cta_25_30s: DM me if you want to be first on the waitlist
copy.caption: Day 1 of building our premium Royal Pop Wrist Conversion Kit. Behind-the-scenes progress and excitement. DM for early access! Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.

shot_list.description: A close-up of the Royal Pop wrist kit components laid out on a dark, sleek surface with controlled side lighting.
shot_list.notes: Focus on the precision and quality of materials.

shot_list.notes: Show the precision and care in measurements.

shot_list.notes: Highlight the selection process of premium components.

shot_list.notes: Show a sequence of crafting steps with clear focus.

shot_list.notes: Focus on the final fit and premium look of the wrist kit.

ai_prompts.prompt: A close-up of a Royal Pop Wrist Conversion Kit laid out on a dark, sleek surface with controlled side lighting. Show all components including the clip-in adapter (matte black or brushed steel), silicone strap (default) or leather strap (upgrade), microfibre pouch, spare pins, and tool. The kit should be premium looking with brushed silver / black / oxblood accents.

items.informed_by_trend: Internet Reaction to Royal Pop Collection
items.preview: Your Thoughts on Royal Pop Collection?

copy.subject: Your Thoughts on Royal Pop Collection?
copy.preview_text: Let us know what you think and help set pricing.
copy.body:
Dear [Subscriber],

We're excited to introduce the Swatch x AP-inspired Royal Pop collection, a unique blend of luxury and affordability. Your opinion is crucial as we gauge interest and refine our offerings.

What do you think of the Royal Pop collection? Share your thoughts and suggest pricing that aligns with premium quality without breaking the bank.

Thank you for being part of our community!

Best regards,
The Royal Pop Team

Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.
copy.cta_text: Reply with your thoughts and pricing suggestions
